subcodes.first_line: O my faithful friend! The fragrances of loving-kindness, wafting from the sacred gardens of the Divine Unity, have perfumed the spirit and consciousness of those endowed with insight [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یار وفادارم ریاض قدس احدیتدن منبعث اولان نفحات عنایت مشام جان و دماغ اهل وجدانی
subcodes.subjects: @suffering and imprisonment, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @forgiveness; a sin-covering eye; patience and forbearance, @Manifestation of God as sun
